chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 1850 of 2025 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ For orders as to maintainability 15.05.2025 Mr. Aftab Alam Mallick, advocate for the petitioner. On the last date following order was passed: “1. Urgency granted. 3. Exemption granted subject to all just exceptions. 2, 4, 5, & 6. Office has raised following objections as to maintainability: “1. How this Petition is maintainable in present form? 2. Why Proper forum was not approached in accordance with relevant law and rules? 3. Page No. 43 is showing that the decision dated 12.03.2025 has been passed and no decision is impugned in this Petition, so how this Petition is maintainable? 4. Legible copies of Page No. 15, 31, 33, 39 to 43 to be filed.” In addition thereto, learned counsel states that petitioner is already availing remedy under SPPRA Rules, hence, he is confronted how perpetual proceedings are maintainable. To come up on 15.05.2025” Today, once again learned counsel for the petitioner remained unable to satisfy on maintainability. Petition is found to be misconceived, hence, dismissed. Judge Judge Amjad
